name: Battery Autonomy Calculator
seo_description: Calculate kwh_necesario, baterias_ud with our free battery storage calculator. Just enter consumo_diario_kwh, dias_autonomia, capacidad_bateria_kwh and get resu

range_hints.dias_autonomia: Días without sol: 1-5 days according to ubicación

result_context: To {consumo_diario_kwh} kWh/day with {dias_autonomia} days of autonomy se need {energia_total_kwh} kWh. Con batteries of {capacidad_bateria_kwh} kWh: {baterias_ud} batteries ({configuracion}).
formula_display: Energy = consumption × days ÷ profundidad_descarga; Baterías = energy ÷ capacidad_unitaria
steps: Configuration: 5 batteries in paralelo (or series-paralelo according to voltaje)
mistakes: No Consider depth of descarga (acorta useful life)
Mezclar batteries of diferente capacidad or antigüedad
No prever BMS (Battery Management System) to litio
desc: Battery Storage Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
